backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the game backend, defining character, item, and marketplace data structures along with CRUD operations, authorization checks, and dungeon/combat result handling. Includes mixins for storage and access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two high-confidence fixes: auditing the 'Enter The Realm' button's onClick in CharacterSelectScreen.tsx and auditing the onSelectCharacter callback in App.tsx to ensure navigation works correctly.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted text file summarizing each frontend source file's purpose and key fixes, serving as a build/audit reference for the frontend codebase.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS entry point that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React app titled 'Abyss Ascendant', mounting the app at the #root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing authentication, routing between screens (login, profile setup, character select, dungeon run, game), and passing stable callbacks like handleSelectCharacter to child screens. Orchestrates local character state, health regen, level-up, and ability modals.
frontend/src/components/AbilitySelectMod: Modal component for selecting and toggling character abilities up to the character's total ability point limit, grouped by archetype, with a confirm callback returning the selected ability IDs.
frontend/src/components/CharacterCreatio: React component for creating a new character with name input, realm selection, and stat point allocation (8 points across STR/DEX/INT/VIT). Also displays existing characters with delete confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/CharacterSelectS: Screen component that lists all existing characters with health bars and status indicators, allowing selection, deletion, or creation of new characters, with loading and error states.
frontend/src/components/CharacterSheet.t: Read-only character detail panel displaying name, realm, level, HP/XP bars, base stats, combat stats, and equipped abilities with buttons to open level-up and ability modals.
frontend/src/components/DungeonRunScreen: Simulates and animates a dungeon run of 5 monsters, streaming combat log entries with a delay, then submits XP/level results to the backend and calls onComplete when the player continues.
frontend/src/components/DungeonSelectScr: UI for choosing a dungeon monster level via slider/input (capped at player level +5), showing XP rate and drop rate info, with a pending loot modal displayed after a completed run.
frontend/src/components/HealthBar.tsx: Reusable health bar component that renders a color-coded progress bar (green/yellow/red) with current and max HP values, supporting both compact and standard display modes.
Renders a tabbed inventory UI (Inventory, Stash, Equipped) for a character, allowing item selection, equipping, and unequipping via callbacks.
frontend/src/components/ItemTooltip.tsx: Displays a styled tooltip card for a GeneratedItem, showing its rarity, base stats, and affixes with icons and color coding.
frontend/src/components/LeaderboardScree: Shows a mock leaderboard with Softcore and Hardcore realm tabs, listing top characters by level and XP using static placeholder data.
frontend/src/components/LevelUpModal.tsx: A modal dialog that lets the player allocate unspent stat points (STR, DEX, INT, VIT) earned from leveling up, then confirms the new base stats.
frontend/src/components/LoginScreen.tsx: Renders the game's login/landing screen with Internet Identity authentication, a logo, feature highlights, and a login/logout button.
frontend/src/components/MarketplaceScree: React component for a player marketplace with browse and sell tabs, allowing users to list inventory items for sale at a set price and buy items listed by other players.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky header navigation component displaying the game logo, character info, health bar, and nav links to all major screens, with logout functionality.
frontend/src/components/ProfessionsPlace: Static placeholder screen for the Professions feature, showing a 'Coming Soon' message with icons and descriptions for Smithing, Alchemy, Tinkering, and Gathering.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that forces new users to choose a validated adventurer username before proceeding, submitting it via the saveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/components/ShrinesPlacehold: Static placeholder screen for the Shrines of Power feature, displaying a 'Coming Soon' message with four shrine types and animated icons.
frontend/src/components/XPBar.tsx: Displays a character's XP progress toward the next level as a styled progress bar, supporting both compact and full display modes.
frontend/src/data/abilities.ts: Defines TypeScript types and a static array of combat abilities (e.g., Power Strike, Fireball, Backstab) with stats like damage multiplier, scaling stat, cooldown, and icon.
frontend/src/data/monsters.ts: Defines the MonsterTemplate interface and a list of 10 monster templates with base stats and level ranges, plus a helper function to compute enemy attack speed based on level.
frontend/src/engine/combatEngine.ts: Implements the core combat simulation engine, including monster generation with stat variance, XP calculation with a stat-power multiplier, and combat result types.
frontend/src/engine/lootGenerator.ts: Generates randomized loot items with rarity rolling, affix selection, and level-scaled stat values for weapons, armor, and trinkets.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useHealthRegen.ts: React hook that regenerates a character's HP by 2 per second while out of combat, syncing to the backend every 10 HP gained or on unmount.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, exposing login/logout functions and status flags backed by the DFINITY AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocalCharacter.ts: React hook that builds and maintains a LocalCharacter state from backend character data, preserving live HP across re-renders and supporting equipment stat bonuses.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend actor interactions including fetching/creating/deleting characters, setting HP, submitting dungeon results, spending stat points, and managing user profiles and marketplace listings.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives, imports Google Fonts (Cinzel, Inter), and defines CSS custom properties for the dark fantasy theme including colors for surfaces, rarity tiers, health bars, and border radius.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider, InternetIdentityProvider, and the root App component.
frontend/src/types/game.ts: Defines core game TypeScript types (LocalCharacter, CharacterStats, BaseStats, Realm, etc.) and pure utility functions for XP/level calculations, max HP, stat points, and ability points.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routing, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL bar without a page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with CSS-variable-based color tokens, custom fonts (Inter, Cinzel, JetBrains Mono), border radius values, and animations for accordion and glow effects.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 39) describing the full-stack ICP hack-and-slash RPG architecture, existing features, and a list of known bugs including HP persistence, XP not saving, and loading screen hangs.
